_changelog: 1.0.0 (2026-04-12): energy 축 sub-SSOT 신설. 전체 16개 도메인 등록.
1.1.0 (2026-04-24): own#16 registry sync — tabletop-fusion domain registered (disk measured, body .md present).

1.2.0 (2026-05-01): SA applied-tech bet #3 — amd-ree-mineshaft-phes mk1 alien-grade 10 PHYSICAL-LIMIT registered. Witwatersrand/Mpumalanga AMD treated as REE/base-metal precipitate-mining feedstock + decommissioned 1-3 km mine shafts repurposed as PHES lower reservoirs. Bernoulli 1738 specific energy 2.72 kWh/m³ at 1 km head + IEA 2021 PHES round-trip 0.80-0.87 + Baes & Mesmer 1976 REE-hydroxide K_sp + Sastri-Shibata 2003 D2EHPA β_Y/Eu 2.5 + McCarthy 2010 Witwatersrand AMD pH 2-4 + ASTM C150 Type V cement 28 MPa vs 9.81 MPa hydrostatic. 6 precursors energy/power-grid + energy/battery-architecture + materials/recycling + physics/fluid + physics/thermodynamics + materials/concrete-technology. F-AMD-MVP-1..5 falsifier deadlines 2026-09-30 (RTE) / 2026-12-31 (REE yield + shaft integrity + DMR licensing) / 2027-06-30 (REE basket NPV).

1.3.0 (2026-05-01): SA applied-tech bet #1 — rooftop-pv-2nd-life-microgrid mk1 alien-grade 10 PHYSICAL-LIMIT registered (proposals/south-africa-applied-tech.md row 1). 50-500 kW rooftop PV + 100-500 kWh second-life NMC EV-battery microgrid for SA clinic/school/SME anchor sites. Reference T2 100 kW PV + 250 kWh battery at USD 150,000 capex with 6.7-yr simple payback at SA loadshedding-blended avoided-cost tariff 0.17 USD/kWh; LCOE 0.12 USD/kWh; discounted payback 11 yr at r=8%. Physical-limit anchors: Shockley-Queisser 1961 PV ceiling 33.7% at Eg=1.34 eV (commercial Si 22% = 65% of SQ peak; Tiedje 1984 + Ruhle 2016) + NREL TMY3 / SAURAN 2400 kWh/m^2/yr SA GHI (top decile globally; PR 0.80 → 1920 kWh/kW/yr) + Wood-Mackenzie 2023 NMC 2nd-life 1500-2500 cycles to 60% SOH at 80% DoD (10-yr calendar life; Schmalstieg 2014 + Wang 2014) + Spotnitz-Franklin 2003 Li-ion thermal runaway 80°C onset (Bernardi 1985 heat-gen + Incropera 2017 nat-conv h=7.5 W/m^2/K → 38°C margin at 40°C SA ambient with extended-fin radiator 32 m^2/250 kWh) + Esram-Chapman 2007 MPPT 99% theoretical × 96% inverter (SMA Sunny Tripower spec) + Cole 1990 LCOE financial-physics. 6 precursors energy/solar-architecture (SQ ceiling + insolation) + energy/battery-architecture (NMC electrochemistry + cycle life) + energy/power-grid (grid-tie inverter + microgrid topology + NRS-097-2/NERSA SSEG) + energy/thermal-management (passive cooling SA peak ambient) + physics/electromagnetism (semiconductor band gap) + materials/recycling (2nd-life EV pack reclamation; Nissan Leaf / Tesla Model S retired packs 70-80% SOH; BloombergNEF 2024 1 GWh/yr supply). F-PV2L-MVP-1..5 90-day MVP gates: F-PV2L-MVP-1 + F-PV2L-MVP-3 + F-PV2L-MVP-5 (2026-09-30 cycle-life < 1500 / SCR < 70% / thermal management > 35°C internal at SA peak summer) + F-PV2L-MVP-2 (2026-10-31 inverter MTBF < 10 yr in SA dust+heat) + F-PV2L-MVP-4 (2026-12-31 NERSA SSEG approval > 18 months). Hardest unknown per SA portfolio row 1: 2nd-life cycle-life data scarcity (Wood-Mackenzie 2023 industry data converges on 2000-cycle midpoint but SA-pilot validation needed). Design-by-physics per own#32, NOT n=6 force-fit. Lint: own#31 v3.19 PASS; own_doc_lint --rule 6 + 15 PASS; §7.1 Python Block A-G all PASS.
